subject: Party Manager (Field)
details:
💼 Job Title: Party Manager (Field)

🧩 About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Party Manager to lead and oversee field operations on-site.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing crews, coordinating activities, and ensuring that all operations are executed safely, efficiently, and in line with project requirements and client expectations.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Lead and supervise field crews and daily site operations
* Plan, coordinate, and execute project activities in the field
* Ensure compliance with HSE policies and safety standards
* Act as the main point of contact between the client and the company on-site
* Monitor project progress, timelines, and performance
* Allocate resources, manpower, and equipment effectively
* Prepare daily, weekly, and final project reports
* Identify and resolve operational challenges in real-time
* Ensure quality control and adherence to technical specifications

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Proven experience as a Party Manager or similar leadership role in field operations
* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Solid understanding of field operations (oil & gas, geophysical, or industrial projects preferred)
* Ability to manage multiple tasks and work under pressure
* Strong communication and client management skills
* Good organizational and decision-making abilities
* Willingness to work in remote or challenging environments

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* Engineering or technical background
* Experience in seismic or survey operations
* HSE certifications (NEBOSH, IOSH, or equivalent)
* Experience with project management tools and reporting systems
* Knowledge of logistics and field resource planning

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to lead large-scale field projects
* Professional and dynamic work environment
* Career growth and leadership development opportunities
* Rotation / site-based benefits (if applicable)

subject: HSE Advisor (Field)
details:
💼 Job Title: HSE Advisor (Field)

🧩 About the Role

We are seeking a proactive and experienced HSE Advisor to support and monitor field operations.
The ideal candidate will ensure that all activities are conducted safely and in compliance with health, safety, and environmental standards, while promoting a strong safety culture across all teams.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Monitor and enforce HSE policies and procedures on-site
* Conduct regular site inspections, audits, and risk assessments
* Identify hazards and implement corrective and preventive actions
* Ensure compliance with local regulations and company HSE standards
* Deliver HSE inductions, toolbox talks, and safety training
* Investigate incidents, accidents, and near misses and prepare reports
* Maintain accurate HSE documentation and records
* Support emergency response planning and drills
* Advise management and field teams on safety improvements

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree or relevant certification in HSE or related field
* Proven experience in a similar HSE role (preferably in field operations)
* Strong knowledge of HSE regulations and best practices
* Experience in risk assessment and incident investigation
* Ability to work in remote or site-based environments
* Strong communication and leadership skills
* High attention to detail and commitment to safety

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* NEBOSH, IOSH, or equivalent HSE certifications
* Experience in oil & gas, construction, or industrial sectors
* Knowledge of environmental management systems
* First Aid and emergency response training
* Familiarity with HSE reporting tools and systems

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to work on major field projects
* Strong safety-focused work environment
* Career growth and professional development opportunities
* Rotation / site benefits (if applicable)

subject: Cost Accountant
details:
💼 Job Title: Cost Accountant.

🧩 About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Cost Accountant to join our finance team.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring, analyzing, and controlling costs to support efficient financial management and informed decision-making.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Analyze production, operational, and project costs
* Prepare cost reports, budgets, and forecasts
* Monitor cost variances and identify areas for improvement
* Support pricing strategies and profitability analysis
* Track and allocate costs across departments and projects
* Assist in preparing financial statements and reports
* Ensure accuracy of cost data and compliance with accounting standards
* Work closely with operations and project teams to control expenses

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
* Proven experience as a Cost Accountant or similar role
* Strong knowledge of cost accounting principles
* Proficiency in Excel and accounting software
* Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail
* Good understanding of budgeting and financial reporting
* Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* Experience in oil & gas, construction, or industrial sectors
* Knowledge of ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, etc.)
* Professional certifications (CMA, ACCA, CPA)
* Experience with project-based accounting
* Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, financial modeling)

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to work on diverse and impactful projects
* Professional and collaborative work environment
* Career growth and development opportunities
* Continuous learning and training support

subject: Legal Officer
details:
🧩 About the Role

We are looking for a qualified and detail-oriented Legal Officer to join our team.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for handling legal matters, ensuring compliance with applicable laws and regulations, and providing legal support across different departments.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Provide legal advice and support to management and internal teams
* Draft, review, and negotiate contracts, agreements, and legal documents
* Ensure company compliance with local laws, regulations, and industry standards
* Handle legal disputes, claims, and litigation matters when required
* Liaise with external legal advisors, authorities, and regulatory bodies
* Monitor changes in legislation and assess their impact on the business
* Maintain legal records and documentation in an organized manner
* Support corporate governance and internal policy development

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree in Law (LLB or equivalent)
* Proven experience in a similar legal role
* Strong knowledge of corporate and commercial law
* Excellent drafting and negotiation skills
* Familiarity with local labor laws and regulations
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* High attention to detail and confidentiality
* Good communication skills in English (Arabic is a plus)

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* Experience in oil & gas, construction, or industrial sectors
* Knowledge of contract management and compliance systems
* Experience working with international contracts
* Legal certification or license to practice
* Familiarity with risk management practices

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to work in a dynamic and professional environment
* Exposure to complex and diverse legal matters
* Career development and learning opportunities
* Supportive and collaborative team

subject: Crew Supervisor in Field
details:
🧩 About the Role

We are looking for an experienced and responsible Crew Supervisor to oversee field operations and lead on-site teams.
The ideal candidate will ensure that all activities are executed safely, efficiently, and in compliance with company and client standards.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Supervise and coordinate daily field operations and crew activities
* Ensure all work is carried out according to safety procedures and HSE standards
* Lead, guide, and support field personnel to achieve operational targets
* Monitor job progress and report performance to management
* Ensure proper use and maintenance of equipment and tools
* Conduct site inspections and ensure compliance with company policies
* Communicate effectively with clients, engineers, and internal teams
* Identify and resolve operational issues in the field
* Prepare daily reports and documentation

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Proven experience as a Crew Supervisor or similar field role
* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Good understanding of field operations (oil & gas / industrial / construction preferred)
* Knowledge of HSE regulations and safety practices
* Ability to work under pressure and in remote environments
* Strong communication and organizational skills
* Problem-solving and decision-making abilities

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* Technical background or certification in a related field
* Experience in oil & gas operations
* HSE certification (NEBOSH, IOSH, or equivalent)
* Experience with reporting tools and field management systems
* Basic computer skills (MS Office, reporting tools)

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to work on large-scale field projects
* Supportive and professional work environment
* Career growth and development opportunities
* Accommodation / rotation (if applicable)

subject: Full Stack Developer (React / React Native)
details:
🧩 About the Role

We are looking for a skilled and motivated Full Stack Developer with strong experience in React.js and React Native to join our team.
You will be responsible for building modern web and mobile applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and delivering high-quality, scalable solutions.

🚀 Key Responsibilities

* Develop and maintain web applications using React.js
* Build mobile applications using React Native
* Design and integrate RESTful APIs
* Work on both frontend and backend development
* Ensure performance, responsiveness, and scalability of applications
* Collaborate with designers, project managers, and other developers
* Debug, test, and optimize applications
* Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code

🧠 Required Skills & Qualifications

* Strong experience with React.js
* Experience with React Native for mobile applications
* Good knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+)
* Experience with Node.js / Express (or any backend framework)
* Familiarity with REST APIs
* Experience with Git and version control systems
* Understanding of responsive design and cross-platform development
* Strong problem-solving skills

⭐ Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

* Experience with TypeScript
* Knowledge of Next.js
* Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand, Context API)
* Familiarity with MongoDB or SQL databases
* Experience with cloud services (AWS, Firebase, etc.)
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines

🎯 What We Offer

* Competitive salary
* Opportunity to work on modern and diverse projects
* Collaborative and comfortable work environment
* Continuous learning and professional development opportunities
* Flexible working options
